input: user-item interaction sequences and item textual descriptions
backbone: self-supervised graph convolutional network (GCN) for embedding, DDPG or DQN for RL
loss: self-supervised graph embedding loss + RL policy/value loss
key_idea: use self-supervised GCN to embed users and items into a shared textual feature space, then reduce action space via candidate set construction for RL-based interactive recommendation
datasets: three public datasets (not named in abstract)
